title: Textile Waste Risk Assessment
description: Industrial-grade tool to quantify and mitigate waste risk in textile manufacturing, based on ISO 14001, Lean Six Sigma, and WERC standards.

inputs.label: Monthly Production Volume (meters)
inputs.businessContext: Total fabric produced per month, used as baseline for waste ratio calculations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total fabric produced per month, used as baseline for waste ratio calculations.

inputs.label: Fabric Type
inputs.businessContext: Different fabric types have distinct waste generation profiles and recycling potential.

businessContext_i18n.en: Different fabric types have distinct waste generation profiles and recycling potential.

inputs.label: Current Waste Percentage (%)
inputs.businessContext: Measured waste as a percentage of total production, including cutting, sewing, and finishing losses.

businessContext_i18n.en: Measured waste as a percentage of total production, including cutting, sewing, and finishing losses.

inputs.label: Rework Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of products requiring rework, a key Lean Six Sigma metric for process efficiency.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of products requiring rework, a key Lean Six Sigma metric for process efficiency.

inputs.label: Defect Density (defects per 1000 meters)
inputs.businessContext: Number of defects per 1000 meters of fabric, critical for quality control.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of defects per 1000 meters of fabric, critical for quality control.

inputs.label: Energy Cost ($/kWh)
inputs.businessContext: Average electricity cost, used to calculate energy waste from inefficient processes.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average electricity cost, used to calculate energy waste from inefficient processes.

inputs.label: Labor Cost ($/hour)
inputs.businessContext: Average hourly wage, used to quantify labor waste from rework and idle time.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average hourly wage, used to quantify labor waste from rework and idle time.

inputs.label: Recycling Capability
inputs.businessContext: Current ability to recycle waste fabric, affecting waste disposal cost and environmental impact.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current ability to recycle waste fabric, affecting waste disposal cost and environmental impact.

inputs.label: ISO 14001 Certified
inputs.businessContext: Indicates if the facility has ISO 14001 environmental management certification, influencing waste reduction practices.

businessContext_i18n.en: Indicates if the facility has ISO 14001 environmental management certification, influencing waste reduction practices.

rules.message: Waste percentage should not be lower than rework rate; check data consistency.
Defect density for denim is unusually high; verify measurement method.
High recycling capability without ISO 14001 certification may indicate unverified processes.

thresholds.message: Waste percentage exceeds 10% – immediate action required.
Rework rate above 5% – investigate root causes.
Defect density exceeds 20 per 1000m – quality control review needed.
